name: Resources
summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

properties.name: AlgorithmNotSupported
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Selected algorithm not supported.

properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Value cannot be null. Parameter name: {0} href-ArgumentNullException.html.

properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Array with no common superclass not yet supported: {0}.

properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An attribute argument must be a constant expression.

properties.name: CloseBracketExpected
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ')' expected - Incomplete Closure.

properties.name: ContainsKeys
properties.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Checks if the specified key is present in the specified key-value pair list.

properties.name: Culture
properties.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.
